task: ok auto merge is set up. just waiting on the windows cargo check.

One thing I think is increasingly clear is the need to update the documentation to distinguish between the root metadata (vault v2) and folder metadata which really confused GH copilot in the reviews.
is there a reason for the root folders ipns pointer to start as v2? this should be a standard v1 folder metadata if I understand it correctly.

yeah definitely the former is a win from me. the PR has already been merged, so I think this iwll need to be done on a fresh branch off main - whether this will need an entire phase is up to you. alternatively just a gsd:todo is sufficient.

task: ok lets tackle that todo. its blocking the release of the vault migration to staging, since the e2e tests are failing.
has the metadata documentation been updated with these new schemas and derivations.

ok so I wanted to ask if my understanding of this new setup is correct: the user inits a vaultKeyBlob which gets stored on IPFS and is pointed at by the users root vault ipns entry. this vault key blob contains both the folder ipns cid (pointing at folder v1 ipfs). the vault key blob is only ever written to once
is there any way to get rid of that initial root folder metadata and immediately create the folder v1 metadata during init?
b is cleaner and i think this is the logical place to do this, before the change is released.
user_feedback_text: b is cleaner and i think this is the logical place to do this, before the change is released.
